title: Imported Raw Fixture Scan
methodology_notes: Raw fixture for importer end-to-end validation.

solvency.evidence: Cash covers near-term obligations and refinancing risk is manageable.

dilution.evidence: Share count is stable and per-share growth exceeds total revenue growth.

revenue_growth.evidence: Revenue stabilized with improving order rates and backlog.

roic.evidence: ROIC recovered above the minimum hurdle relative to peers.

valuation.evidence: Normalization assumptions still clear the hurdle at current price.

invalidation_triggers.evidence: Quarterly gross margin below prior trough

decision_memo.better_than_peer: Higher FCF margin than industrial peers
decision_memo.safer_than_peer: Lower leverage and positive FCF trajectory
decision_memo.what_makes_wrong: Demand softness in core end markets

issues_and_fixes.fix: Price increases visible in gross margin

stretch_case_assumptions.discount_path: Full margin recovery plus re-rating to industrial compounder multiple

analysis_inputs.moat_assessment: Long customer qualification cycles support switching costs.
analysis_inputs.thesis_summary: RAW1 is a turnaround with visible operating leverage and clear self-help catalysts.

base_case_assumptions.discount_path: Industrial baseline 16x plus turnaround re-rating to 20x

q1_operational.justification: The risks are operational and can be monitored in reported margins.

q2_regulatory.justification: The business operates in a stable regulatory environment.

q3_precedent.justification: Comparable industrial turnarounds have recovered on similar self-help plans.
q3_precedent.evidence: Named precedent set from sector work.

q4_nonbinary.justification: There is a range of recoveries rather than a single binary event outcome.

q5_macro.justification: Macro sensitivity exists but is not the dominant risk driver.
